design_philosophy: A trustworthy, clean, mobile-first interface designed for handling sensitive identity data (Aadhaar) and managing blue-collar workforce operations. Built for clarity and speed.

fonts.heading: Outfit
fonts.setup_instructions: Import 'Outfit' (weights 500,600,700) and 'Manrope' (weights 400,500,600) from Google Fonts. Apply font-outfit to Headings and font-manrope to the Body.

spacing_and_layout.container_strategy: Mobile-first PWA approach. Wrap main app in max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-slate-50 relative pb-20 (to account for bottom nav).

surfaces.app_header: sticky top-0 w-full h-16 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 flex items-center justify-between px-5 z-40
surfaces.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-16 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-200 flex justify-around items-center z-50 pb-safe
surfaces.card_default: bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm
surfaces.card_elevated: bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-slate-100
surfaces.input_field: w-full bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-sm text-slate-900 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:border-transparent transition-all
surfaces.primary_button: w-full bg-blue-900 text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold text-sm flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-blue-800 transition-colors shadow-sm active:scale-[0.98]
surfaces.secondary_button: w-full bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold text-sm flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-slate-200 transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]

component_instructions.WebView: Embed https://aanservices.in via iframe with w-full h-full border-none. Sub-container must be h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] to not overlap with bottom nav. Show a centered Loader2 (animate-spin) while loading.
component_instructions.Aadhaar_Capture: Crucial trust component. Use HTML5 <input type='file' accept='image/*' capture='environment' className='hidden' /> connected to a styled trigger button (e.g., 'Take Photo'). Show a clear rounded-xl preview of the Base64 image with a 'Retake' overlay button.
component_instructions.Dashboard_Grid: Use Bento grid (grid-cols-2). 'Total Employees' card: col-span-1 bg-blue-900 text-white. 'Industries': col-span-1 bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200. 'Recent Onboards' list: col-span-2 bg-white.
component_instructions.Forms: Group logically. 1. Personal Info, 2. Job Details, 3. Aadhaar Upload. Use flex-col gap-5. Labels should be uppercase, tracking-wide (text-xs text-slate-500 mb-1.5 inline-block).
component_instructions.Employee_List: Use a virtualized or mapped list. Each row: Avatar on left, Name/Designation in middle, Industry Tag on right (badge style: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full).
component_instructions.Testing: MANDATORY: Add data-testid to every button, input, nav item, and key text element.

media.usage: Use worker_hero images in empty states (e.g., 'No employees found') or onboarding screens, rounded-xl with an overlay.
